phrases.intent_en: Ask a wine merchant for a bottle suitable as a gift
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me conseiller un vin de Bordeaux pour l'offrir en cadeau ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh kohn-say-YAY un VAN duh bor-DOH poor loh-FREER ahn kah-DOH
phrases.cultural_note: The Chartrons district was historically home to Dutch and Irish wine merchants; it remains the heart of Bordeaux's wine négociant trade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask the price of a particular bottle of Saint-Émilion
phrases.text_local: Quel est le prix de cette bouteille de Saint-Émilion ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh luh PREE duh set boo-TAY duh san-tay-mee-LYOHN
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Émilion is one of Bordeaux's most celebrated appellations, producing predominantly Merlot-based wines.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the antique dealer accepts offers on the price
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que vous acceptez les négociations sur le prix ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh voo-ZAK-sep-TAY lay nay-goh-SYAH-SYON soor luh PREE
phrases.cultural_note: The Chartrons is lined with antique shops and galleries, especially along the Rue Notre-Dame, where gentle bargaining is sometimes accepted.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they can ship wine purchases to the UK or US
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que vous pouvez expédier des vins à l'étranger ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh voo poo-VAY ex-pay-DYAY day VAN ah lay-TRAHN-zhay
phrases.cultural_note: Several wine merchants in the Chartrons specialise in international shipping; rules on duty and import limits vary by country.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Sunday organic market is held
phrases.text_local: Où se tient le marché bio du dimanche dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TYAN luh mar-SHAY BYOH doo dee-MAHNSH dahn suh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: A popular Sunday organic market runs along the quais in the Chartrons area, attracting locals and visitors alike.

responses.phonetic: soor lay KEH, luh dee-MAHNSH mah-TEHN
responses.local: Sur les quais, le dimanche matin.
